title: sanvitalia fruticosa
intro: Sanvitalia fruticosa, also known as Creeping Zinnia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues such as eczema, acne, and minor wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sanvitalia fruticosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations. Sanvitalia fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
